compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md to document REBASE_HEAD handling alongside MERGE_HEAD
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Update CLAUDE.md hook architecture and test gate sections to document REBASE_HEAD handling:

1. In the Hook architecture section, where MERGE_HEAD is mentioned for pre-commit-review-gate.sh and pre-commit-test-gate.sh, add that REBASE_HEAD is handled symmetrically
2. In the test gate description, note that incoming-only files are excluded during both merge and rebase operations
3. In the review gate description, note symmetric REBASE_HEAD support
4. Update any references to MERGE_HEAD filtering to note the parallel REBASE_HEAD support

TDD exemption: Static assets only (Markdown documentation). No conditional logic, no executable behavior to test. Exemption criterion: unit exemption #3 (static assets).

## File Impact
- CLAUDE.md (modify — update hook architecture sections)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions REBASE_HEAD alongside MERGE_HEAD in hook architecture
  Verify: grep -q 'REBASE_HEAD' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] Documentation references symmetric handling
  Verify: grep -c 'REBASE_HEAD' CLAUDE.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'

comments.body: Fixed: CLAUDE.md updated with REBASE_HEAD documentation. Committed as 02ce82fb.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
